Ingredients: almonds; water; dates or honey; cardamom (optional)
Steps: Soak almonds overnight and peel them. Blend almonds with fresh water until smooth. Strain through a fine cloth or sieve. Sweeten lightly if desired and chill before serving.

Ingredients: potato; cauliflower; onion; tomato; ginger-garlic; turmeric; chili powder; garam masala; oil; salt; coriander
Steps: Heat oil and sauté onion with ginger-garlic. Add tomato and spices and cook until the masala softens. Add potato and cauliflower and mix well. Cover and cook on low heat until tender. Garnish with coriander and serve hot.

Ingredients: apple
Steps: Wash the apple well. Slice or eat whole as preferred. Serve fresh.

Ingredients: bread slices; ripe avocado; lemon juice; salt; pepper; chili flakes
Steps: Toast the bread until crisp. Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Spread on toast and top with chili flakes. Serve immediately.

Ingredients: banana
Steps: Peel the banana. Slice if needed. Serve fresh.

Ingredients: mixed berries; milk or yogurt; banana; honey; chia seeds (optional)
Steps: Add berries, banana, and milk or yogurt to a blender. Blend until smooth and creamy. Add honey if needed and pulse once more. Pour into a glass and serve chilled.

Ingredients: bhindi; onion; oil; turmeric; chili powder; coriander powder; salt
Steps: Wash and dry the bhindi completely, then slice it. Heat oil and sauté onion until soft. Add bhindi and spices and cook uncovered on medium heat. Stir occasionally until the bhindi is tender and lightly crisp.

Ingredients: egg; water; salt; pepper
Steps: Place eggs in a pan and cover with water. Boil for 8 to 10 minutes. Cool under running water and peel. Sprinkle salt and pepper before serving.

Ingredients: broccoli; garlic; oil; pepper; salt; soy sauce (optional)
Steps: Cut broccoli into florets. Heat oil and sauté garlic briefly. Add broccoli and stir-fry on high heat for a few minutes. Season with salt, pepper, and a little soy sauce if using.

Ingredients: brown bread; cucumber; tomato; onion; butter or chutney; salt; pepper
Steps: Spread butter or chutney on bread slices. Layer cucumber, tomato, and onion on one slice. Sprinkle salt and pepper. Cover with another slice and cut before serving.

Ingredients: brown rice; water; salt
Steps: Rinse the brown rice well. Add rice and water to a pot or cooker. Cook until soft and fluffy. Rest for a few minutes and fluff before serving.

Ingredients: chia seeds; milk; honey; vanilla; fruits for topping
Steps: Mix chia seeds with milk, honey, and vanilla. Stir well and let it rest for 10 minutes, then stir again. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight. Top with fruits before serving.

Ingredients: chicken; basmati rice; onion; tomato; yogurt; ginger-garlic; biryani masala; mint; coriander; oil or ghee; salt
Steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt, ginger-garlic, and spices. Partly cook the rice separately. Fry onions and cook chicken masala until tender. Layer rice and chicken with herbs. Dum cook on low heat until fragrant and fully cooked.

Ingredients: chicken; onion; tomato; ginger-garlic; chili powder; turmeric; coriander powder; garam masala; oil; salt
Steps: Heat oil and sauté onion until golden. Add ginger-garlic, tomato, and spices and cook into a masala. Add chicken and coat it well. Add water as needed and simmer until chicken is cooked. Finish with garam masala and coriander.

Ingredients: chicken pieces; yogurt; ginger-garlic; lemon juice; chili powder; garam masala; oil; salt
Steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt, lemon juice, and spices. Rest for at least 30 minutes. Thread on skewers or place on a tray. Grill or bake until cooked through and slightly charred. Serve hot.

Ingredients: chicken; rice; onion; whole spices; ginger-garlic; green chili; oil or ghee; salt; coriander
Steps: Heat oil and sauté whole spices and onion. Add ginger-garlic and chicken and cook for a few minutes. Add washed rice, water, and salt. Cover and cook until rice and chicken are done. Rest and fluff before serving.

Ingredients: bread; cooked chicken; onion; cucumber; mayo or hung curd; pepper; salt
Steps: Mix shredded chicken with mayo or hung curd, salt, and pepper. Spread onto bread. Add onion and cucumber slices. Cover, cut, and serve.

Ingredients: chicken; onion; carrot; garlic; pepper; salt; herbs; water
Steps: Boil chicken with onion, carrot, garlic, and water. Simmer until chicken is tender and the broth is flavorful. Shred the chicken and return it to the soup. Season with salt and pepper and serve hot.

Ingredients: chicken; yogurt; ginger-garlic; lemon juice; tikka masala; oil; salt
Steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt, lemon juice, and tikka masala. Let it rest for at least 1 hour. Grill, roast, or air-fry until cooked and slightly charred. Serve with onion and lemon.

Ingredients: chickpeas; onion; tomato; ginger-garlic; chole masala; tea bag (optional); oil; salt; coriander
Steps: Soak chickpeas overnight and pressure cook until soft. Heat oil and cook onion, ginger-garlic, tomato, and spices into a masala. Add chickpeas and simmer until flavors blend. Garnish with coriander and serve.

Ingredients: cornflakes; milk; sugar or honey; nuts or fruits (optional)
Steps: Pour cornflakes into a bowl. Add cold or warm milk. Top with sugar, honey, nuts, or fruits if desired. Serve immediately.

Ingredients: cucumber; onion; lemon juice; salt; pepper; coriander
Steps: Slice cucumber and onion. Toss with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Garnish with coriander and serve fresh.

Ingredients: milk; curd starter
Steps: Warm the milk until lukewarm. Mix in a little curd starter. Cover and rest in a warm place for 6 to 8 hours. Chill after setting and serve.

Ingredients: toor dal; onion; tomato; garlic; turmeric; chili powder; cumin; oil or ghee; salt; coriander
Steps: Cook the dal until soft. Heat oil or ghee and sauté cumin, onion, and garlic. Add tomato and spices and cook well. Mix in the dal and simmer for a few minutes. Garnish with coriander.

Ingredients: dal; onion; tomato; garlic; ginger; turmeric; cumin; red chili; ghee; salt; coriander
Steps: Cook the dal until soft and season lightly. Prepare a tempering with ghee, cumin, garlic, onion, and chili. Add tomato and cook briefly. Pour the tadka over the dal and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes. Garnish and serve.

Ingredients: dosa batter; oil or ghee
Steps: Heat a dosa tawa and lightly grease it. Pour batter and spread in a thin circle. Drizzle a little oil around the edges. Cook until crisp and fold. Serve with chutney or sambar.

Ingredients: eggs; onion; tomato; ginger-garlic; turmeric; chili powder; garam masala; oil; salt
Steps: Boil and peel the eggs. Prepare a masala with onion, ginger-garlic, tomato, and spices. Add water for gravy and simmer. Add eggs and cook for a few minutes before serving.

Ingredients: cooked rice; eggs; onion; carrot; beans; garlic; soy sauce; pepper; oil; salt
Steps: Scramble the eggs in a hot pan and keep aside. Sauté garlic, onion, and vegetables in oil. Add cooked rice, soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Mix in the scrambled eggs and toss well.

Ingredients: oats; peanut butter; honey; nuts; seeds; dates
Steps: Mix oats, peanut butter, honey, chopped nuts, seeds, and dates. Press the mixture into a tray. Chill until firm. Cut into bars and store.

Ingredients: chickpeas; onion; garlic; parsley; cumin; coriander powder; flour; salt; oil
Steps: Soak chickpeas and grind with onion, garlic, herbs, and spices. Shape the mixture into small balls or patties. Deep-fry, bake, or air-fry until crisp. Serve with dip or salad.

Ingredients: fish; onion; tomato or coconut milk; ginger-garlic; turmeric; chili powder; oil; salt
Steps: Heat oil and cook onion with ginger-garlic. Add tomato or coconut base and spices and cook well. Add fish pieces gently. Simmer until the fish is cooked. Serve hot.

Ingredients: fish fillets; turmeric; chili powder; lemon juice; ginger-garlic; oil; salt
Steps: Marinate fish with lemon juice and spices. Rest for 20 to 30 minutes. Shallow fry until golden on both sides. Serve hot.

Ingredients: potatoes; oil; salt; pepper or herbs
Steps: Peel and cut potatoes into strips. Soak briefly and pat dry. Fry or air-fry until golden and crisp. Sprinkle salt and serve.

Ingredients: cooked rice; mixed vegetables; garlic; spring onion; soy sauce; pepper; oil; salt
Steps: Heat oil and sauté garlic and vegetables. Add cooked rice and toss on high heat. Season with soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Finish with spring onion.

Ingredients: apple; banana; papaya; mango; pomegranate; honey; lemon juice
Steps: Wash and chop all fruits. Add them to a bowl. Drizzle honey and lemon juice. Toss gently and serve chilled.

Ingredients: rolled oats; nuts; seeds; honey; cinnamon; oil
Steps: Mix oats, nuts, seeds, honey, cinnamon, and a little oil. Spread on a tray. Bake until golden, stirring once or twice. Cool completely before storing.

Ingredients: curd or yogurt
Steps: Place yogurt in a muslin cloth or strainer. Let excess whey drain for a few hours in the fridge. Transfer the thick yogurt to a bowl. Serve chilled.

Ingredients: chicken breast; olive oil; lemon juice; garlic; pepper; salt; herbs
Steps: Marinate the chicken breast with oil, lemon juice, garlic, and seasonings. Rest for 30 minutes. Grill or pan-cook until cooked through. Slice and serve.

Ingredients: fish fillet; lemon juice; garlic; pepper; herbs; oil; salt
Steps: Marinate the fish with lemon juice, garlic, herbs, and salt. Rest briefly. Grill or pan-sear until flaky and cooked through. Serve hot.

Ingredients: boiled chickpeas; tahini; garlic; lemon juice; olive oil; salt; cumin
Steps: Blend chickpeas, tahini, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and cumin. Add a little water if needed for smoothness. Drizzle olive oil on top. Serve with pita or vegetables.

Ingredients: idli batter; oil
Steps: Grease the idli moulds lightly. Pour batter into the moulds. Steam for 10 to 12 minutes until cooked. Cool slightly and unmould before serving.

Ingredients: rice; cumin; ghee or oil; bay leaf; salt; water
Steps: Rinse the rice and keep aside. Heat ghee and crackle cumin with bay leaf. Add rice and sauté briefly. Add water and salt and cook until done. Fluff before serving.

Ingredients: rice; moong dal; turmeric; cumin; ghee; ginger; salt; water
Steps: Wash rice and dal together. Heat ghee and sauté cumin and ginger. Add rice, dal, turmeric, salt, and water. Cook until soft and slightly mushy. Serve warm.

Ingredients: lasagna sheets; vegetables or chicken; tomato sauce; white sauce; cheese; oil; salt; herbs
Steps: Prepare the filling and sauces. Layer sauce, sheets, filling, and cheese in a baking dish. Repeat the layers. Bake until bubbly and cooked through. Rest briefly before slicing.

Ingredients: lentils; onion; tomato; garlic; carrot; pepper; salt; oil
Steps: Cook lentils until soft. Sauté onion, garlic, and carrot in a little oil. Add tomato and the cooked lentils. Simmer until flavors combine, then blend lightly if desired. Season and serve hot.

Ingredients: macaroni; onion; tomato; vegetables; oil; herbs; salt; cheese optional
Steps: Boil macaroni until just tender. Sauté onion and vegetables in oil. Add tomato base or seasonings and mix in the macaroni. Toss well and serve hot.

Ingredients: mango
Steps: Wash the mango. Peel and slice or cube it. Serve fresh.

Ingredients: mango; milk or yogurt; honey; ice cubes
Steps: Add mango pieces, milk or yogurt, and honey to a blender. Blend until smooth. Add ice if desired and blend once more. Serve chilled.

Ingredients: potatoes; milk; butter; salt; pepper
Steps: Boil potatoes until soft and peel them. Mash well with milk and butter. Season with salt and pepper. Serve warm.

Ingredients: milk
Steps: Boil the milk if needed. Cool slightly or chill as preferred. Serve plain.

Ingredients: millet; moong dal; vegetables; cumin; turmeric; ginger; ghee; salt; water
Steps: Wash millet and dal. Heat ghee and sauté cumin, ginger, and vegetables. Add millet, dal, turmeric, salt, and water. Pressure cook or simmer until soft. Serve hot.

Ingredients: mixed vegetables; onion; tomato; ginger-garlic; turmeric; chili powder; oil; salt
Steps: Heat oil and sauté onion and ginger-garlic. Add tomato and spices and cook into a masala. Add mixed vegetables and cook until tender. Serve warm.

Ingredients: mushroom; onion; garlic; pepper; milk or cream optional; oil; salt
Steps: Sauté onion, garlic, and mushrooms in oil. Add water or stock and simmer. Blend until smooth if desired. Season with salt and pepper and serve hot.

Ingredients: maida; curd; baking powder; sugar; salt; oil; water
Steps: Prepare a soft dough with maida, curd, baking powder, sugar, salt, and water. Rest the dough. Roll portions into naan shapes. Cook on a hot tawa or bake until puffed and lightly charred.

Ingredients: noodles; onion; cabbage; carrot; capsicum; soy sauce; oil; salt; pepper
Steps: Boil noodles and drain. Heat oil and sauté vegetables on high heat. Add noodles, soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Toss well and serve hot.

Ingredients: oats; milk or water; honey; nuts; fruits
Steps: Bring milk or water to a gentle boil. Add oats and cook until soft. Sweeten lightly if desired. Top with nuts or fruits and serve.

Ingredients: eggs; onion; chili; coriander; oil; salt; pepper
Steps: Beat eggs with onion, chili, coriander, salt, and pepper. Heat oil in a pan. Pour the mixture and cook until set. Fold and serve hot.

Ingredients: orange
Steps: Wash the orange. Peel and separate the segments. Serve fresh.

Ingredients: spinach; paneer; onion; tomato; garlic; ginger; green chili; spices; oil; salt
Steps: Blanch spinach and blend it into a puree. Prepare a light masala with onion, tomato, garlic, and spices. Add spinach puree and simmer. Add paneer cubes and cook briefly before serving.

Ingredients: paneer; onion; tomato; green chili; turmeric; chili powder; oil; salt; coriander
Steps: Heat oil and sauté onion and chili. Add tomato and spices and cook until soft. Crumble paneer into the pan and mix well. Garnish with coriander and serve hot.

Ingredients: paneer; onion; tomato; butter; cream optional; ginger-garlic; spices; oil; salt
Steps: Prepare a rich tomato-onion gravy with butter and spices. Blend if needed for smoothness. Add paneer cubes and simmer gently. Finish with cream if using and serve.

Ingredients: bread; paneer; onion; capsicum; chutney or butter; pepper; salt
Steps: Crumble or slice paneer and season it lightly. Spread chutney or butter on bread. Add paneer and vegetables. Close, toast if desired, and serve.

Ingredients: paneer; capsicum; onion; yogurt; lemon juice; tikka masala; oil; salt
Steps: Marinate paneer and vegetables in yogurt and spices. Skewer or spread on a tray. Grill or roast until lightly charred. Serve hot.

Ingredients: papaya
Steps: Peel the papaya and remove the seeds. Cut into cubes or slices. Serve fresh.

Ingredients: wheat flour; water; oil or ghee; salt
Steps: Knead wheat flour, water, and salt into a soft dough. Roll into rounds. Cook on a hot tawa with a little oil or ghee until golden on both sides. Serve hot.

Ingredients: pasta; onion; tomato or white sauce; vegetables; garlic; herbs; oil; salt
Steps: Boil the pasta until just tender. Prepare the sauce with garlic, vegetables, and tomato or white base. Add the pasta and toss well. Season with herbs and serve.

Ingredients: bread; peanut butter; banana slices optional
Steps: Toast the bread lightly. Spread peanut butter evenly on top. Add banana slices if desired. Serve immediately.

Ingredients: boiled peanuts; onion; tomato; coriander; green chili; lemon juice; salt
Steps: Mix boiled peanuts with onion, tomato, coriander, and chili. Add lemon juice and salt. Toss well and serve fresh.

Ingredients: flour; yeast; sugar; salt; oil; water
Steps: Prepare a soft dough with flour, yeast, sugar, salt, oil, and water. Let it rise. Roll into small discs. Bake or cook on a hot surface until puffed.

Ingredients: poha; onion; mustard seeds; curry leaves; turmeric; peanuts; green chili; oil; salt; lemon
Steps: Wash poha lightly and drain. Heat oil and crackle mustard seeds with curry leaves, chili, and peanuts. Add onion and turmeric, then mix in the poha and salt. Finish with lemon juice and serve.

Ingredients: prawns; onion; tomato or coconut milk; ginger-garlic; turmeric; chili powder; oil; salt
Steps: Clean and marinate prawns lightly with salt and turmeric. Cook onion, ginger-garlic, tomato or coconut base with spices. Add prawns and simmer briefly until cooked. Serve hot.

Ingredients: milk or water; protein powder; banana or dates optional
Steps: Add milk or water to a blender or shaker. Add protein powder and banana or dates if using. Blend or shake until smooth. Serve immediately.

Ingredients: quinoa; water; salt
Steps: Rinse quinoa well. Add quinoa and water to a pan. Cook until the grains open and the water is absorbed. Fluff and serve.

Ingredients: rajma; onion; tomato; ginger-garlic; rajma masala; oil; salt; coriander
Steps: Soak rajma overnight and pressure cook until soft. Prepare a masala with onion, ginger-garlic, tomato, and spices. Add rajma and simmer well. Garnish with coriander and serve.

Ingredients: ramen noodles; broth; vegetables; soy sauce; garlic; boiled egg optional
Steps: Prepare the broth with garlic, vegetables, and seasonings. Cook the noodles separately or in the broth as needed. Assemble in a bowl with noodles and toppings. Serve hot.

Ingredients: boiled chickpeas; oil; chili powder; cumin; salt
Steps: Dry the chickpeas well. Toss with oil and spices. Roast or air-fry until crisp. Cool slightly before serving.

Ingredients: peanuts; salt
Steps: Dry roast peanuts on low to medium heat. Stir until fragrant and lightly crisp. Cool, peel if desired, and season with salt.

Ingredients: wheat flour; water; salt optional
Steps: Knead wheat flour and water into a soft dough. Roll small portions into thin circles. Cook on a hot tawa until spots appear on both sides. Puff directly on flame if desired.

Ingredients: lettuce; cucumber; tomato; onion; carrot; lemon juice; salt; pepper
Steps: Wash and chop all vegetables. Add to a bowl. Season with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Toss and serve fresh.

Ingredients: toor dal; tamarind; mixed vegetables; sambar powder; mustard seeds; curry leaves; oil; salt
Steps: Cook the dal until soft. Boil vegetables with tamarind water and sambar powder. Mix in the cooked dal and simmer. Prepare a tempering with mustard seeds and curry leaves and add it on top.

Ingredients: eggs; onion; butter or oil; salt; pepper; coriander
Steps: Beat the eggs lightly. Heat butter or oil and sauté onion if using. Add eggs and stir continuously on low heat. Cook until softly set and season before serving.

Ingredients: minced meat or soya mix; onion; ginger-garlic; chili; garam masala; coriander; salt
Steps: Mix mince with onion, ginger-garlic, herbs, and spices. Shape around skewers or into logs. Grill, bake, or pan-cook until done. Serve hot.

Ingredients: soybeans; water; sugar optional
Steps: Soak soybeans overnight. Blend with water and strain the mixture. Boil the strained milk for several minutes. Sweeten lightly if desired and cool before serving.

Ingredients: spaghetti; garlic; tomato sauce; vegetables or chicken; olive oil; herbs; salt
Steps: Boil spaghetti until al dente. Heat oil and prepare the sauce with garlic and tomato base. Add spaghetti and toss well. Season with herbs and serve.

Ingredients: sprouts; onion; tomato; cucumber; coriander; lemon juice; salt; pepper
Steps: Steam the sprouts lightly if preferred. Mix with onion, tomato, cucumber, and coriander. Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Toss and serve.

Ingredients: broccoli; carrot; beans; peas; salt; pepper; butter optional
Steps: Cut vegetables into even pieces. Steam until just tender. Season with salt and pepper. Add a little butter if desired and serve.

Ingredients: sweet potato; salt; pepper; lemon optional
Steps: Wash the sweet potato well. Boil, steam, roast, or bake until soft. Peel if needed, season lightly, and serve.

Ingredients: tofu; broccoli; bell pepper; onion; garlic; soy sauce; oil; salt; pepper
Steps: Pan-sear tofu until lightly golden. Sauté garlic, onion, and vegetables in oil. Add tofu back to the pan with soy sauce and pepper. Toss well and serve.

Ingredients: tomato; onion; coriander; lemon juice; salt; pepper
Steps: Slice tomatoes and onion. Add coriander, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Toss gently and serve fresh.

Ingredients: tomato; onion; garlic; pepper; butter or oil; salt
Steps: Cook tomatoes, onion, and garlic until soft. Blend into a smooth puree. Simmer again and season with salt and pepper. Serve hot.

Ingredients: tortilla; grilled vegetables or chicken; lettuce; sauce; salt; pepper
Steps: Warm the tortilla slightly. Add the filling and sauce in the center. Fold the sides and roll tightly. Slice and serve.

Ingredients: almonds; peanuts; cashews; raisins; seeds; dried fruits
Steps: Combine all nuts, seeds, and dried fruits in a bowl. Mix well. Store in an airtight container. Serve as a snack.

Ingredients: rava; onion; mustard seeds; curry leaves; green chili; vegetables; oil; salt; water
Steps: Dry roast the rava lightly and keep aside. Heat oil and temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, onion, and chili. Add water and salt and bring to a boil. Stir in the rava gradually and cook until soft.

Ingredients: burger buns; veg patty; onion; tomato; lettuce; sauce
Steps: Cook the veg patty until crisp. Toast the buns lightly. Assemble with sauce, patty, onion, tomato, and lettuce. Serve immediately.

Ingredients: maida wrappers; cabbage; carrot; onion; garlic; pepper; salt
Steps: Prepare a filling with finely chopped vegetables and seasonings. Fill the wrappers and seal the edges. Steam until cooked through. Serve with chutney.

Ingredients: pizza base; pizza sauce; cheese; onion; capsicum; tomato; corn; herbs
Steps: Spread pizza sauce over the base. Add vegetables and cheese on top. Bake until the base is crisp and the cheese melts. Slice and serve.

Ingredients: mixed vegetables; onion; tomato; ginger-garlic; spices; oil; salt
Steps: Prepare a masala with onion, ginger-garlic, tomato, and spices. Add mixed vegetables and a little water. Cook until tender. Serve hot.

Ingredients: rice; mixed vegetables; onion; whole spices; oil or ghee; salt; coriander
Steps: Heat oil and sauté whole spices and onion. Add vegetables and washed rice. Pour in water and salt. Cook until rice is fluffy and vegetables are tender.

Ingredients: bread; cucumber; tomato; beetroot; onion; butter or chutney; salt; pepper
Steps: Spread butter or chutney on bread slices. Add sliced vegetables and season lightly. Close the sandwich and cut into pieces. Serve fresh or toasted.

Ingredients: mixed vegetables; onion; garlic; pepper; salt; herbs; water
Steps: Boil or sauté vegetables with onion and garlic. Add water or stock and cook until tender. Blend lightly or leave chunky as desired. Season and serve hot.

Ingredients: milk or water; whey protein; banana optional; peanut butter optional
Steps: Add liquid to a shaker or blender. Add whey protein and optional banana or peanut butter. Blend or shake until smooth. Serve immediately.

Ingredients: rice; water; salt optional
Steps: Rinse the rice well. Cook with water until soft and fluffy. Rest briefly before fluffing and serving.
